content.query:
CREATE SCHEMA gold;
GO

CREATE VIEW gold.calendar
AS
SELECT *
FROM OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'https://awstorageabhi.dfs.core.windows.net/silver/AdventureWorks_Calendar/*.parquet',
    FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
) AS query1;
GO

GO
